CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Priority__c, "P0 (Contingent on a deal for current month)") , IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004YrZZ", "P0"), IF( ISPICKVAL(Priority__c, "P1 (High Urgency)" ) , IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004YrZe", "P1"), IF( ISPICKVAL(Priority__c, "P2 (Risk Account/Prospect)") , IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004YrZt", "P2"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004Yra8", "P3"))))
CustomField.label: Priority Pic
